NotebookLM Skill Modernization

PR #1352v1.2.0 → v1.3.0 notebooklm-mcp-cli v0.5.25 full adoption
12
New Capabilities
4
Tool Renames
5
Files Updated
17
Versions Caught Up

New Capabilities 12

video_format + visual_style
3 video formats (explainer, brief, cinematic) + 9 visual styles (classic, whiteboard, kawaii, anime...)
studio_create
audio_length
short | default | long — control podcast duration alongside format
studio_create
PPTX export
Download slide decks as PowerPoint in addition to PDF
download_artifact(slide_deck_format="pptx")
Bulk URL addition
Add multiple URLs in one call with optional wait-for-processing
source_add(urls=[...], wait=True)
Studio artifact rename
Rename generated artifacts without regenerating
studio_status(action="rename")
Slide formats
detailed_deck | presenter_slides with short/default length
studio_create
Report formats
Briefing Doc, Study Guide, Blog Post, Create Your Own
studio_create
Quiz/flashcard params
difficulty (easy/medium/hard) + question_count
studio_create
Infographic options
orientation (landscape/portrait/square) + detail_level (concise/standard/detailed)
studio_create
Audio sources
Upload m4a, wav, mp3, aac, ogg, opus as notebook sources
source_add(type="file")
Multi-browser auth
Arc, Brave, Edge, Chromium, Vivaldi, Opera + WSL2
nlm login
Enterprise base URL
NOTEBOOKLM_BASE_URL env var for Google Workspace
config

Tool Renames 4

studio_list_types→studio_status(action="list_types")
pipelines→pipeline
tags→tag
cinematic_video (artifact_type)→video + video_format="cinematic"

Files Updated

FileChanges
SKILL.mdWhat's New, tool table, key decisions, examples, compat (240 lines)
rules/workflow-studio-content.mdArtifact type names: audio_overview→audio, video_overview→video, cinematic_video→video
rules/workflow-batch-pipelines.mdpipelines→pipeline, tags→tag, v0.4.6→v0.5.25
rules/workflow-research-discovery.mdRemoved stale v0.5.0 version ref
rules/_sections.mdUpdated descriptions and version refs
NotebookLM skill modernized to v1.3.0: 12 new capabilities from notebooklm-mcp-cli 0.5.25, 4 tool renames fixed, 5 files updated.
